headline: Benchmark Downgrades Diamondback Energy (FANG) Following “Unremarkable” Q4 Results
summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) is included among the 13 Best Defensive Dividend Stocks for 2025. On March 5, Benchmark downgraded Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) to Hold from Buy. The firm did not assign a price target, citing valuation concerns. The analyst noted that the shares have lagged the XLE and XOP year to date. Fourth-quarter […]
